name: Creamy Cheese Fondue (4 Mwave Too)
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup dry white wine or apple juice
3 ounces cream cheese with chives, softened
Cubed bread, fruit wedges or veggies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat the wine or juice until it is just bubbling.
2. Add the shredded American cheese and mustard to the saucepan.
3. Stir continuously until the cheese is melted, smooth, and bubbly.
4. Lower the heat and stir in the cream cheese. Continue cooking over low heat until the mixture is smooth.
5. Transfer the mixture to a heated fondue pot to maintain a bubbling consistency for dipping.
To Microwave:
1. Use only 1/2 cup of wine or juice in a 1-quart casserole dish.
2. Place all ingredients except the dippers into the dish.
3. Nuke on high for 4-5 minutes, stirring every minute until melted and bubbly.
4. Serve as above.
